prompt_protocol.rule: Fill text_prompt with a short noun phrase for the class/appearance, and instance_hint with how to identify the selected GT object among similar instances.
prompt_protocol.scope: manual SA-V text labels for selected official object IDs
prompt_protocol.verification: Text-only top-1 localization may select a different same-class instance. Use instance_hint for human review, and use GT-assisted matching only as a diagnostic metric.

samples.instance_hint: tiny sign-like object on the far right side of the street scene, inside the blue box
samples.review_note: Small target; verify whether the selected object is a sign or another roadside fixture before reporting final text-prompt metrics.

samples.instance_hint: diagonal cable crossing the sky near the top of the frame
samples.review_note: Very thin elongated object; text localization may be ambiguous with nearby cables.

samples.instance_hint: long rectangular sign or wall panel above the window in the restaurant scene
samples.review_note: The object is a large rectangular fixture, not a person; verify label after visual review.

samples.instance_hint: performer on stage wearing bright green pants; selected mask covers the pants/lower body
samples.review_note: Mask is clothing/lower-body region rather than the whole person; use clothing phrase for text-prompt frame mode.

samples.instance_hint: child in the foreground; selected mask covers the right side of the white shirt
samples.review_note: Partial clothing mask; whole-person prompt would not match the selected GT object as closely.

samples.instance_hint: small orange fish near the center-bottom of the pond, inside the blue box
samples.review_note: Small target among many fish; same-class ambiguity is expected for text-only localization.

samples.instance_hint: left-side wedge-shaped wooden ramp surface in the indoor skate park
samples.review_note: Selected object is the ramp surface, not the nearby skater.

samples.instance_hint: child near the center of the birthday room; selected mask covers green pants/lower body
samples.review_note: Partial clothing/lower-body mask; text prompt targets clothing rather than whole child.

samples.instance_hint: tiny traffic cone clipped at the lower-left image edge
samples.review_note: Very small edge target; expect weak text localization.

samples.instance_hint: dancing woman on the left; selected mask covers her lower body/black pants
samples.review_note: Partial lower-body mask; prompt intentionally names the clothing region, not the whole person.
